segments.text: The back airdodge gets caught by the minecart!
segments.original_text: ここは後ろ回避がトロッコ当たってしまう

segments.text: Coming back safely from the side and above!
segments.original_text: 横から上から安全に返ってくる

segments.text: But down tilt into up smash!
segments.original_text: しかし下強からの上スマッシュ

full_text: The back airdodge gets caught by the minecart! Coming back safely from the side and above! Out of resources! But down tilt into up smash! I see!

corrections.original: 下強化の上スマッシュ
corrections.corrected: 下強からの上スマッシュ
